blocks.text: I need to check the container environment to figure out what image we're running.

Tool: exec
Input: {"command":"cat /proc/1/cgroup 2>/dev/null | head -5\nhostname\ndocker inspect $(hostname) --format '{{.Config.Image}}'"}

name: config_inspection_no_memory
description: Agent inspects config files and credentials — should summarize actions, not file contents

blocks.text:
Tool: exec
Input: {"command":"cat /data/.openclaw/state/do-together/trakt-tokens.json | python3 -c \"import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); d['access_token']='***'; d['refresh_token']='***'; print(json.dumps(d,indent=2))\"\necho \"---\"\ncat /data/.openclaw/do-together-state.json 2>/dev/null"}
